old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-oqv7.4","title":"Add nRF52840DK gateway Renode backend","description":"Add a target-specific recipe for nrf52840dk/nrf52840 gateway firmware, reusing the stock core and completed BLE model. new_value: Added nrf52840dk/support/nrf52840dk.{repl,resc} reusing nrf52840_lichen core + NRF52840_BLE for gateway BLE/CoAP AUTOSTART with GATT harness. Canonical ELF boots and reaches readiness markers. Verified via build+Renode recipe. Commit 36ebd8306
